title: Lagé Estrategia
description: Social media strategy and digital animation for commercial and corporate accounts, including Eddie Bauer Costa Rica and Quarzo Tecnología.
challenge: Connecting visual execution with the actual performance of content and paid media, across commercial and corporate accounts with very different audiences and goals.
objective: Develop communication and content strategies that position each brand, supported by finely crafted audiovisual and animated pieces for social media.
role: Social Media Strategist and Digital Animator: I conceptualized digital campaigns, produced motion graphics and audiovisual pieces, and animated client logos for the agency's portfolio.
strategy: Produce proposals, reports and recommendations that translate performance data into creative decisions, closing the loop between strategy, production and results.

process.title: Strategy & concept
process.description: Communication strategy development and digital campaign concepts per account.

process.title: Production & animation
process.description: Motion graphics, animation and audiovisual pieces for social media and the agency's portfolio.

process.title: Reporting & optimization
process.description: Proposals, reports and recommendations connecting visual execution with content and media performance.

results.summary: Campaigns that combine concept, animation and analysis: the Eddie Bauer Costa Rica launch reached more than half a million people in one month.

caseStudies.title: Quarzo Tecnología
caseStudies.description: The case where the work expanded from execution to strategy: defining the brand and the animated content system for the technology company.
caseStudies.challenge: The brand needed its own consistent visual voice: moving from loose pieces to a recognizable system that could sustain its tech communication over time.
caseStudies.objective: Apply a full brand strategy and translate it into a content system — logo animation included — repeatable across every post.
caseStudies.role: Brand strategist and Digital Animator: definition of the visual and communication system, and production of the pieces and identity animation.
caseStudies.strategy: From brand diagnosis to execution: visual principles, tone and a system of animated pieces that give Quarzo a coherent, contemporary presence.

process.title: Brand strategy
process.description: Diagnosis, visual principles and communication tone for the technology brand.

process.title: Content system
process.description: Translating the strategy into repeatable templates and pieces for social media.

process.title: Identity animation
process.description: Logo animation and motion graphics that bring the brand system to life.

caseStudies.title: Eddie Bauer Costa Rica
caseStudies.description: Communication and content strategy for the outdoor brand's launch in Costa Rica.
caseStudies.challenge: Introducing an international outdoor brand to the Costa Rican audience and generating measurable traction from the very first month.
caseStudies.objective: Launch the brand in the local market with a digital campaign that maximized reach, recall and visits.
caseStudies.role: Social media strategy, campaign concept and production of content and animation pieces.
caseStudies.strategy: A launch campaign coordinated between organic content and paid media, with audiovisual pieces designed for each network's format and rhythm.

process.title: Launch concept
process.description: Defining the communication approach to introduce the brand to the Costa Rican market.

process.title: Piece production
process.description: Content and animations adapted to each social network's formats.

process.title: Measurement
process.description: Campaign performance tracking and results reporting.

results.summary: The launch surpassed half a million people reached in February 2026.

seo.title: Lagé Estrategia — Workspace · Adrián D. Bonilla
seo.description: Social media strategy, motion graphics and digital animation at Lagé Estrategia: Eddie Bauer Costa Rica, Quarzo Tecnología and more.
